title: Sick Leave Policy and Reporting Absences
text:
Q: What is the company's sick leave policy and how do I report an absence?
A: Our company provides paid sick leave to ensure employees can recover from illness without financial stress. Employees are entitled to 10 days of sick leave per year, which can be used for personal illness or to care for an immediate family member. To report an absence, notify your direct supervisor as soon as possible, ideally before your scheduled start time. You should also update your status in the company HR system, indicating the expected duration of your absence. If your sick leave extends beyond three consecutive days, a doctor's note may be required. For any questions or further assistance, please contact the HR department.
